raw.title: Sea Beet, Sugar Beet
raw.excerpt:
The summer the visitors flock from the cities to the sandy lands: the children run...

The post Sea Beet, Sugar Beet appeared first on Dark Mountain.

llm_processed.summary: Learning about the versatile plant sea beet, noting its comparison to sugar beet in terms of both usage and its ability to thrive in different environments.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: This resource enables a connection between lesser known crops and practical post-growth agriculture as a potential bounce point for transition towns.
